Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOUGLAS A. SCULLION OF GORDON & REES LLP, TEL. NO. 986-5900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
STEVEN LOPEZ & ERIC KOEHLER, TEL. NO. 441-8680, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; CROSS-DEFENDANTS GORDON & REES LLP AND ANDREW D CASTRICONE'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: CROSS-DEFENDANTS GORDON & REES LLP AND ANDREW D CASTRICONE'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT Request for Judicial Notice, granted as unopposed. Demurrer sustained, without leave to amend. The action is time-barred. Cross-Complainants' claims all stem from Cross-Defendants' alleged legal malpractice. Therefore the statute of limitations at C.C.P. 340.6 applies. Cross-Complainants admit that Cross-Defendants' legal representation ended on April 14, 2008. Cross-Complaint, 50. Cross-Complainants were on notice of claims not later than February 2008. Cross-Complaint, 53. Cross-Complainants filed their Cross-Complaint on March 23, 2012, which is thus time-barred. Cross-Complainants have not shown how they may plead in good faith around the statute of limitations. No tolling past April 2008 is possible. Cross-Complaint, 50. Amendment is futile. ORDER SIGNED.
Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =302/CK
